text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio invites me to go visit a shrine for New
Year's.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow... Look at all these people!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If this many people are coming here to make a
wish, then the gods must have their work cut out
for themselves!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's hurry up and get in line! At this rate,
even the gods are gonna close up shop!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! We finally crossed that off the list!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming with me! I sure wasn't expecting it to be this crowded!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I was thinking about coming
here with Prez...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But given what I was planning to pray for, I
figured it'd be best to come with you instead.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I prayed to become strong enough to
surpass Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to enter senior year, so I'm practically
right on Prez's tail!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna enter a bunch of big-league races and
become the greatest racer of them all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, what did you pray for? You looked
pretty serious back there.
choice_data_list: To help you get even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow! You were thinking about me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, I won't leave it to chance! Last year made
me realize just how important my body is!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I won't push myself and I'll make sure to take
breaks! I'll show you how much I can take care of
my health!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Help me get stronger?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, when you say it like that, I feel like I need
to go at it even harder!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Very well. The great Teio shall grant your wish!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Improve my skills? You mean like... work on the
stuff I'm good at?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So you think that's really important for me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, okay! I'll take your words to heart!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...You know, now I think of it, doesn't your prayer
sound more like a promise?
choice_data_list:
Effort is a key part in making wishes come true,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah. I guess the gods help those who help
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then I wanna change my prayer to "Enjoy
watching me as I surpass Prez!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We'd better get back in line! Come on—let's go,
slowpoke!
